arts.ttl: In pictures: Carlisle United fans at the Accrington game!
arts.sum: At last - a victory to cheer at Brunton Park! Now check out Ben Holmes' brilliant fan photos from Carlisle United's win over Accrington Stanley.

arts.ttl: Crewe Alexandra boss Lee Bell hoping to 'hurt' Carlisle United on New Year's Day
arts.sum: CREWE Alexandra manager Lee Bell has said that he will be looking to 'hurt' Mike Williamson's Carlisle United on New Year's Day.

arts.ttl: Williamson calls for Carlisle United to be 'resilient' against Crewe Alexandra
arts.sum: CARLISLE United manager Mike Williamson has called for his side to be 'resilient' when they face Crewe Alexandra on New Year's Day.

arts.ttl: 'If we stick together we will climb the table' - Jones' Carlisle United rallying cry
arts.sum: CARLISLE United's Jordan Jones has called for unity between the club and supporters after the Blues' 2-1 victory against Accrington Stanley.

arts.ttl: Preview: Crewe Alexandra vs. Carlisle United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's League Two clash between Crewe Alexandra and Carlisle United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
